creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)
(...)

repeated blocks to be removed:
---
-SUB_FILES=     Custom.pm \
-               custom-convert.conf \
-               logitechmediaserver.conf
-SUB_LIST=      PERL=${PERL} \
-               PORTNAME=${PORTNAME} \
-               SITE_PERL=${PREFIX}/${SITE_PERL_REL} \
-               SLIMDIR=${SLIMDIR} \
-               SLIMDBDIR=${SLIMDBDIR} \
-               SLIMUSER=${SLIMUSER} \
-               SLIMGROUP=${SLIMGROUP} \
-               CONFFILES="${CONFFILES}"

@@ -86,12 +73,6 @@ TEST_VARS_OFF=               CONTRIB_FLAGS=-t
 DOCFILES=      Changelog*.html License*.txt
 CONFFILES=     convert.conf types.conf

-PLIST_SUB=     SLIMDIR=${SLIMDIR} \
-               SLIMDBDIR=${SLIMDBDIR} \
-               OPSYS=${OPSYS:tl} \
-               ARCH=${ARCH} \
-               ARCHNAME=${ARCHNAME}
---
